Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=(S)-scoulerine + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = (S)-tetrahydrocolumbamine + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:23808, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:17129, ChEBI:CHEBI:17772, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789; EC=2.1.1.117; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:22535422}; PhysiologicalDirection=left-to-right; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:23809; Evidence={ECO:0000305|PubMed:22535422}; CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=3-O-acetyl-4'-O-demethylpapaveroxine + (S)-S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 3-O-acetylpapaveroxine + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:57396, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:141643, ChEBI:CHEBI:141645, ChEBI:CHEBI:142094; EC=2.1.1.352; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:29723437}; PhysiologicalDirection=left-to-right; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:57397; Evidence={ECO:0000305|PubMed:29723437};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Methyltransferase involved in the biosynthesis of the benzylisoquinoline alkaloid noscapine (PubMed:22535422, PubMed:27378283, PubMed:29610307, PubMed:29723437). Catalyzes the conversion of (S)-scoulerine to (S)-tetrahydrocolumbamine (PubMed:22535422). The heterodimers SOMT2-SOMT3 and SOMT2-6OMT convert 3-O-acetyl-4'-O-demethylpapaveroxine to 3-O-acetylpapaveroxine, where SOMT2 is the catalytic subunit (PubMed:27378283, PubMed:29723437). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:22535422, ECO:0000269|PubMed:27378283, ECO:0000269|PubMed:29610307, ECO:0000269|PubMed:29723437}.
